data.title: US: CLARITY Act Changes Rules For Crypto
data.description:
The US Congress introduces the CLARITY Act, a bipartisan bill to regulate cryptocurrencies and stablecoins, improve protection and clarity for users and companies.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/regulation/us-clarity-act-changes-rules-for-crypto/

data.title: BTCT Buys 292 BTC After $125M Raise, TSX Listing Next
data.description:
BTCT raises $125M, buys 292 BTC, and confirms TSX Venture Exchange listing starting June 30 under the symbol BTCT.
source: https://coincu.com/345523-btct-buys-292-btc-after-125m-raise

data.title: Hong Kong unveils policy statement 2.0 to lead global digital asset innovation
data.description:
27-6-2025 – Hong Kong has unveiled a comprehensive policy blueprint for the advancement of digital assets. Released on June 26 by the Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau (FSTB), the Policy Statement 2. 0 articulates a visionary roadmap to refine and broaden the regulatory landscape for virtual assets, ensuring both robust oversight and economic integration. source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/hong-kong-unveils-policy-statement-2-0-to-lead-global-digital-asset-innovation/

data.title: After the release of PCE data, the probability of the Fed cutting interest rates has not changed much, with a 25 basis point rate cut to 22.7%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CME's "Fed Watch": The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in July is 77.3% (previously 79.3%), and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 22.7% (previously 20.7%). The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in September is 8.1% (previously 8.2%), the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 71.6% (previously 73.3%), and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 20.4% (previously 18.5%). (Jinshi)

data.title: PCE data weakened, the US dollar index fell, and US Treasury yields fell
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News PCE data weakened, and US Treasury yields fell slightly. The US dollar index DXY fell 10 points in the short term and is now at 97.15. The increase in US core PCE in May was higher than expected. (Jinshi)

data.title: Resupply Protocol Exploited for Millions in Cryptocurrency Theft
data.description: According to Odaily, SlowMist founder Yu Jian revealed that the decentralized stablecoin protocol Resupply was exploited by attackers who used an interest inflation vulnerability to steal assets. The attackers manipulated the Controller contract of a new vault to trigger price inflation, causing the exchange rate to drop to zero and bypass collateral verification. This allowed them to borrow a large amount of reUSD with only 1 wei of collateral. The stolen funds, now converted to ETH, are valued at over $9.5 million. The hackers utilized Tornado Cash for gas fees.

data.title: U.S. Core PCE Price Index for May Exceeds Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. core Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index for May showed an annual rate of 2.7%. This figure surpassed the anticipated rate of 2.6% and was revised from the previous value of 2.5% to 2.6%.

data.title: Traders increase bets Fed will cut rates three times by 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Traders expect the Federal Reserve to start cutting interest rates in September, increasing bets that the Fed will cut interest rates three times in 2025. (Jinshi)

data.title: Russian woman sentenced to seven years in prison for $23 million in Bitcoin scam
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News A Russian woman who claimed to be a cryptocurrency expert was sentenced to seven years in prison by a Moscow court for planning and implementing a Ponzi scheme within 60 days in 2023, defrauding investors of $23 million (2.2 billion rubles) worth of Bitcoin. The woman's name is Valeria Fedyakina, from Simferopol. She pretended to be a legitimate cryptocurrency trader with offices around the world under the name "Bitmama", promising customers that they could use cryptocurrency to transfer funds overseas to bypass Western sanctions. (Decrypt)

data.title: Before the PCE data was released, the probability that the Fed would keep interest rates unchanged in July was 79.3%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CME's "Fed Watch": The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in July is 79.3%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 20.7%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in September is 8.2%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 73.3%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 18.5%. (Jinshi)

data.title: French Fintech Firm BD Multimedia Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, French fintech company BD Multimedia has expanded its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring an additional 10.95 BTC. This acquisition brings the company's total Bitcoin assets to 14.75 BTC.

data.title: OpenRouter Completes $40 Million Financing, Led by Andreessen Horowitz and Menlo Ventures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OpenRouter, co-founded by former OpenSea CTO Alex Atallah, announced the completion of US$40 million in financing (including seed round and A round), led by Andreessen Horowitz and Menlo Ventures, and participated by Sequoia Capital and a group of angel investors. OpenRouter is an AI infrastructure startup that provides a market and routing platform for LLM, bringing together hundreds of models from providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic and Meta, and automatically directing user prompts to the most suitable model based on cost, speed, accuracy and privacy requirements. (The Block)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Expects Trade Agreements Before Labor Day
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent expressed optimism about finalizing a trade agreement before Labor Day. He mentioned that they are very close to reaching an agreement on the state and local tax (SALT) issues within the tax bill. Besent anticipates the completion of 10 trade agreements, with a total of 10 to 12 agreements expected. Following this, there are 20 significant agreements still to be addressed. Labor Day, a national holiday in the United States, is observed on the first Monday of September to honor workers.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Kashkari Anticipates Two Rate Cuts in 2025
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has indicated that two interest rate cuts are expected in 2025. The first reduction is anticipated to occur in September. This statement reflects ongoing assessments of economic conditions and monetary policy adjustments.

data.title: Fed's Kashkari: If rate cut in September and tariff impact later emerges, rate cut may be paused
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Kashkari of the Federal Reserve said that if the Federal Reserve cuts interest rates in September and the impact of tariffs is subsequently apparent, the rate cut measures may be suspended. (Jinshi)

data.title: French fintech company BD Multimedia increases holdings by 10.95 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: French fintech company BD Multimedia announced an increase of 10.95 BTC, and its current total Bitcoin holdings have increased to 14.75. The company said it is building a Bitcoin treasury designed to achieve resilience and exponential growth.

data.title: CryptoQuant: Bitcoin miners’ revenue drops to near two-month low, but selling pressure remains
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin miners' income has fallen to the lowest level since April, with daily earnings falling to $34 million. However, despite the decline in profitability, there is no sign of forced selling as miners' wallet outflows remain low. In addition, Bitcoin mining companies' reserves are also increasing, indicating a long-term strategy in the current low-price environment. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitcoin Miners' Revenue Hits Lowest Level Since April
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin miners have seen their revenue drop to the lowest level since April, with daily earnings falling to $34 million. Despite the decline in profitability, there are no signs of forced selling as miner wallet outflows remain low. Additionally, Bitcoin mining companies are increasing their reserves, indicating a long-term strategy in the current low-price environment.

data.title: Calamos Launches Three Bitcoin ETFs to Provide Downside Protection for Investors
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Asset management company Calamos announced the launch of three Bitcoin exchange-traded funds, aiming to provide investors with downside protection exposure, namely: Calamos Bitcoin Structured Alt Protection ETF, Calamos Bitcoin 90 Series Structured Alt Protection ETF and Calamos Bitcoin 80 Series Structured Alt Protection ETF. These three ETFs intend to invest in US stock benchmark indices and Bitcoin, and are expected to start trading on July 8. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Musk: Grok 4 to be released after July 4
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk posted on the X platform that he and the xAI team have been working all night to improve Grok, and the progress is going smoothly. Grok 4 is expected to be released after July 4, and another large-scale run is needed to build a specialized encoding model.
